document_summary: This exhibit presents the profile of Dr. Qiji Ma from the China Marketing Research Association (CMRA) Think Tank Expert page. Ma is a fellow Data Awards winner and a prominent market research expert in China. He is described as one of the earliest practitioners of market research in mainland China, having held senior positions at Nielsen China, Sinomonitor, and other major companies. Ma also serves as a Researcher at the China National Institute of Advertising and a Think Tank Expert. This document demonstrates the caliber of other Data Awards recipients.

snippets.text: One of the earliest practitioners of market research in mainland China and one of the first registered consultants in China.
snippets.subject: Qiji Ma
snippets.reasoning: Establishes Ma as a pioneer in China's market research field, demonstrating the elite caliber of fellow Data Awards winners.

snippets.text: From 2006 to 2010, Senior Vice President of Nielsen China online, leading product development and research team of China's Internet media and network applications, and committed to promoting the establishment and value realization of evaluation systems of China's Internet marketing and advertising, e- commerce and concerned markets.
snippets.subject: Qiji Ma
snippets.reasoning: Ma held SVP position at Nielsen China, a globally renowned market research firm, showing the seniority of Data Awards peers.

snippets.text: Researcher of China National Institute of Advertising
snippets.subject: Qiji Ma
snippets.reasoning: Ma's affiliation with the China National Institute of Advertising as a Researcher demonstrates his institutional standing.

snippets.text: Serving as a consultant or expert in Tencent Think Tank, NetEase Think Tank, Didi Strategy Research Institute, Alimama Marketing Institute, Letv Marketing Institute, Qihoo Marketing Institute, Storm Marketing Institute, Xiaomi Expert Group, Airmedia Think Tank, Institute of Panorama and other institutes, think tanks and institutions. He is a member or works as judge of several award institutions, including Effie China Effectiveness Award, Tiger Roar Award for Digital Marketing, Golden Mouse Award for Network Marketing, ECI National Digital Business Innovation Award, IAI International Advertising and Marketing Award, China College Students Advertising Competition, and National College Students Innovation, Creativity and Entrepreneurship Contest, etc. And he has been serving as a visiting professor at Peking University, Communication University of China, and other colleges and universities.
snippets.subject: Qiji Ma
snippets.reasoning: Ma's extensive roles as consultant at major tech companies (Tencent, Didi, Xiaomi) and judge at prestigious awards (Effie, Golden Mouse) demonstrate the exceptional caliber of Data Awards peer winners.
